subcodes.first_line: Thy call hath reached the Most Holy, Most Luminous and Most Exalted Court, and that which thou didst mention, this servant hath duly presented [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندایت بساحت اقدس انور اعلی رسید و آنچه ذکر نمودی عبد حاضر معروض داشت
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
